name: badge
description: Status badge with error, success, warning, and info variants. Supports dot, pill, and circular modes.

props.name: label
props.description: Text content of the badge; when omitted renders as a small status dot

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color variant of the badge

props.name: circular
props.description: Renders the badge as a fixed-size circle instead of a pill

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset; only affects the circular badge shape

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Custom accessibility label; defaults to 'label variant' when omitted

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
// Notification dot on avatar
<Avatar initials="JD" badge={<Badge variant="error" />} />

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Warning badge on a list item, small size
<Badge label="Overdue" variant="warning" size="sm" />
